title: Claude Fable5 Access Permissions Significantly Adjusted: Some Users Lose Access Rights Anthropic Accelerates Expansion
excerpt: Anthropic announced adjustments to the subscription access policy for the Claude Fable5 model. Starting from July 20th, users with Max and Team Premium plans ca
content_html:
Anthropic announced adjustments to the subscription access policy for the Claude Fable5 model. Starting from July 20th, users with Max and Team Premium plans can still use Fable5, but their usage limits will be significantly reduced. After the reward usage period ends, the regular usage quota will decrease by 33%, and the actual available quota for Fable5 will be only 50% of the adjusted limit.

At the same time, users with Pro and Team Standard plans will lose access to Fable5. Anthropic will provide these users with a one-time usage credit of $100, after which they will need to pay according to API pricing. Due to the high cost of frequent calls, this credit may be consumed quickly.

Anthropic stated that the company is continuously investing resources to improve computing capacity and acknowledged that the demand for the Fable series models has grown beyond expectations, affecting the user experience to some extent. It is reported that Anthropic had previously considered removing Fable entirely from the subscription plans, and this adjustment is seen as a balance between computing power pressure and market competition.

Industry analysts believe that changes in the competitive environment have also influenced Anthropic's strategy adjustment. With OpenAI launching new models such as GPT-5.6Sol, some models offer more competitive pricing while maintaining similar performance. Additionally, AI products from the Chinese market continue to drive price competition, increasing cost pressures on mid-to-high-end model services.

This access adjustment reflects the growing tensions between model demand growth, computing power supply, and commercialization models as the AI industry enters a stage of large-scale application. Balancing user experience with controlling inference costs has become a critical challenge for major AI companies.

Due to the high cost of frequent calls, this credit may be consumed quickly.

sentences.en: Due to the high cost of frequent calls, this credit may be consumed quickly.

sentences.en: It is reported that Anthropic had previously considered removing Fable entirely from the subscription plans, and this adjustment is seen as a balance between computing power pressure and market competition.

sentences.en: Additionally, AI products from the Chinese market continue to drive price competition, increasing cost pressures on mid-to-high-end model services.

Balancing user experience with controlling inference costs has become a critical challenge for major AI companies.

sentences.en: This access adjustment reflects the growing tensions between model demand growth, computing power supply, and commercialization models as the AI industry enters a stage of large-scale application.
sentences.zh: 此次准入调整，反映出随着人工智能产业进入规模化应用阶段，模型需求增长、算力供给与商业化模型之间的矛盾日益加剧。

sentences.en: Balancing user experience with controlling inference costs has become a critical challenge for major AI companies.
sentences.zh: 平衡用户体验与控制推理成本已成为各大人工智能公司面临的关键挑战。

content_html_zh:
Anthropic 宣布调整 Claude Fable5 模型的订阅访问政策。 从7月20日开始，拥有Max和Team Premium套餐的用户仍然可以使用Fable5，但其使用限制将大幅减少。 奖励使用期结束后，常规使用额度将减少33%，《神鬼寓言5》实际可用额度仅为调整后额度的50%。

同时，拥有 Pro 和 Team Standard 计划的用户将无法访问《神鬼寓言 5》。 Anthropic 将为这些用户提供 100 美元的一次性使用积分，之后他们需要根据 API 定价付费。 由于频繁通话的成本较高，这笔积分可能很快就会被消耗掉。

Anthropic表示，公司正在不断投入资源提高计算能力，并承认Fable系列机型的需求增长超出预期，在一定程度上影响了用户体验。 据悉，Anthropic此前曾考虑将《神鬼寓言》完全从订阅计划中剔除，此次调整被视为算力压力与市场竞争之间的平衡。

业内分析人士认为，竞争环境的变化也影响了Anthropic的战略调整。 随着 OpenAI 推出 GPT-5.6Sol 等新模型，一些模型在保持相似性能的同时提供了更具竞争力的价格。 此外，中国市场的人工智能产品持续推动价格竞争，加大中高端机型服务的成本压力。

此次准入调整，反映出随着人工智能产业进入规模化应用阶段，模型需求增长、算力供给与商业化模型之间的矛盾日益加剧。 平衡用户体验与控制推理成本已成为各大人工智能公司面临的关键挑战。
